# @leafpad/blogs — LLM Reference

> Package: @leafpad/blogs  
> Version: 0.3.1  
> Purpose: TypeScript SDK for fetching and rendering LeafPad blog posts in any JavaScript application.  
> Source: https://leafpad.io  
> License: ISC

## Overview

`@leafpad/blogs` lets you integrate LeafPad-managed blog content into any web project. It provides:
- An API client (`BlogsService`) for fetching posts and docs from LeafPad's public REST API
- HTML rendering utilities (`BlogPostFormat`) that produce ready-to-use HTML strings
- Content helpers (`BlogUtils`) for read time, date formatting, text extraction, and slugification
- TOC utilities (`renderTOCHTML`, `attachObserverToTOCLinks`) for table-of-contents generation and DOM observation
- A pre-built stylesheet bundled at `src/styles/style.css`

## Installation

```
npm install @leafpad/blogs
```

## Exports (index.ts)

```ts
export { BlogsService } from './src/core/blogs.js'
export { BLOG_CONFIG, type BlogsConfigType } from './src/core/blog_config.js'
export * from './src/types/types.js'
export { BlogPostFormat } from './src/utils/BlogPostFormat.js'
export { default as BlogUtils } from './src/utils/BlogUtils.js'
export { default as BlogApiError } from './src/core/BlogsError.js'
export { attachObserverToTOCLinks, renderTOCHTML, type TOCOptions } from './src/utils/createToc.js'
```

---

## Module: src/core/blogs.ts

### Class: BlogsService

Primary API client. Handles HTTP requests with timeout, retry, and exponential backoff.

```ts
new BlogsService(organizationSlug: string, config?: BlogsConfigType)
```

**Methods:**

```ts
fetchPosts(options?: FetchPostsOptions): Promise<BlogApiResponse>
```
Fetch paginated published blog posts. Options: page, limit, includeHtml, md, tags[], search, docs.

```ts
fetchBlog(slug: string, options?: FetchPostOptions): Promise<BlogPost | null>
```
Fetch a single post by URL slug. Returns null if 404. Throws BlogApiError on other failures.

```ts
fetchDocs(options?: FetchPostsOptions): Promise<DocsResponse>
```
Fetch documentation posts structured as a hierarchical tree (DocItem[]). Posts with parentId are nested under their parent. Sorted by `position` field at all levels.

**Internals (private):**
- `buildUrl(endpoint, params)` — Constructs the full API URL
- `makeRequest<T>(url, options)` — Fetch wrapper with AbortController timeout, 3 retries, exponential backoff, BlogApiError on HTTP errors
- `fetchItems(options)` — Builds URLSearchParams and calls makeRequest

**Error behavior:**
- 4xx responses → throws immediately, no retry
- 5xx responses → retries up to `config.retries` times with 2^attempt second delay
- Timeout → throws BlogApiError with code 'TIMEOUT'
- All retries exhausted → throws BlogApiError with code 'MAX_RETRIES_EXCEEDED'

---

## Module: src/core/blog_config.ts

```ts
type BlogsConfigType = {
  baseUrl?: string                        // default: 'https://leafpad.io'
  apiPath?: string                        // default: '/api/public/v1/post'
  defaultLimit?: number                   // default: 10
  maxPostsForFiltering?: number           // default: 50
  cacheRevalidateInterval?: number        // default: 300 (seconds)
  staticParamsRevalidateInterval?: number // default: 3600 (seconds)
  wordsPerMinute?: number                 // default: 200
  timeout?: number                        // default: 10000 (ms)
  retries?: number                        // default: 3
}

const BLOG_CONFIG: Required<BlogsConfigType> // all defaults as const
```

---

## Module: src/core/BlogsError.ts

```ts
class BlogApiError extends Error {
  name: 'BlogApiError'
  status?: number     // HTTP status code, e.g. 404, 500
  code?: string       // 'HTTP_404', 'HTTP_500', 'TIMEOUT', 'MAX_RETRIES_EXCEEDED'
  constructor(message: string, status?: number, code?: string)
}
```

---

## Module: src/types/types.ts

### Core Data Types

```ts
interface BlogPost {
  id: number
  name: string                  // Post title
  slug: string                  // URL slug
  createdAt: string             // ISO date string
  updatedAt: string             // ISO date string
  published: boolean
  hasChildren: boolean          // Has child doc posts
  parentId?: number             // Parent post id for docs hierarchy
  position: string              // Sort key for docs ordering
  content?: any                 // Raw BlockNote JSON content
  htmlContent?: string          // Pre-rendered HTML (when includeHtml: true)
  md?: string                   // Raw Markdown (when md: true)
  textContent?: string          // Plain text version
  tocItems: { level: number; text: string; id: string }[]  // Headings for TOC
  seo?: BlogSEO
  tags: BlogTag[]
  organization: BlogOrganization
  createdByUser: { name: string; image?: string }
}

interface BlogTag { id: number; name: string }

interface BlogSEO {
  title?: string
  description?: string
  image?: string
  keywords?: string[]
}

interface BlogOrganization { id: string; name: string; slug: string }

interface BlogPagination {
  page: number
  limit: number
  totalCount: number
  totalPages: number
  hasNext: boolean
  hasPrev: boolean
}

interface BlogApiResponse {
  posts: BlogPost[]
  pagination: BlogPagination
  organization: BlogOrganization
}

type DocItem = {
  id: number
  label: string
  path?: string
  position: string
  children?: DocItem[]   // Nested children for docs tree
}

interface DocsResponse {
  items: DocItem[]
  pagination: BlogPagination
  organization: BlogOrganization
}

interface FetchPostsOptions {
  page?: number         // default: 1
  limit?: number        // default: config.defaultLimit (10)
  includeHtml?: boolean // default: true
  md?: boolean          // default: false
  tags?: string[]       // filter by tag names
  search?: string       // full-text search
  docs?: boolean        // fetch docs posts only
}

interface FetchPostOptions {
  includeHtml?: boolean // default: true
  md?: boolean          // default: false
}
```

---

## Module: src/utils/BlogPostFormat.ts

All methods are **static** and return `string` (HTML).

### Rendering Full Posts

```ts
BlogPostFormat.completeBlogPost({ post: BlogPost, toc?: boolean, config?: CompleteBlogPostItemsConfig }): string
```
Renders a full blog post inside `.blogs-container`. Sections controlled by `config`.

```ts
BlogPostFormat.blogPostWithToc({ post: BlogPost, config?: CompleteBlogPostItemsConfig }): string
```
Renders post + `<aside class="blog-post-toc" id="toc">` side panel.

```ts
BlogPostFormat.blogPost({ post: BlogPost, toc?: boolean, config?: CompleteBlogPostItemsConfig }): string
```
Renders with or without TOC based on `toc` flag.

### CompleteBlogPostItemsConfig (all default true)

```ts
{
  title?: boolean       // <h1> title
  description?: boolean // SEO description paragraph
  meta?: boolean        // date + read time
  author?: boolean      // author avatar section
  divider?: boolean     // <hr>
  image?: boolean       // hero image
  content?: boolean     // HTML content body
  tags?: boolean        // tags section at bottom
}
```

### Blog Card Listing

```ts
BlogPostFormat.blogCards({ posts: BlogPost[], urlPrefix?: string }): string
// urlPrefix default: '/blogs'
// Returns: <div class="blog-cards-container">...</div>

BlogPostFormat.blogCard({ post: BlogPost, urlPrefix?: string }): string
// Returns: <div class="blog-card">...</div>
// Includes: image, title, excerpt, meta (author + date + readtime), read-more link
```

### Individual Sections

```ts
BlogPostFormat.header({ title, description, image, tags, author, date, readTime }): string
BlogPostFormat.headerImage({ image, title }): string        // <img> or ''
BlogPostFormat.headerTitle({ title }): string               // <h1 id="{slug}">
BlogPostFormat.headerDescription({ description }): string  // <p> or ''
BlogPostFormat.headerTags({ tags }): string                 // <div class="blog-post-tags">
BlogPostFormat.headerMeta({ author, date, readTime }): string
BlogPostFormat.content({ htmlContent }): string             // <section class="blog-post-content">
BlogPostFormat.tags({ tags }): string                       // <section class="blog-post-tags-section">
BlogPostFormat.author({ author, organization }): string     // author avatar + org
BlogPostFormat.meta({ date, readTime }): string
BlogPostFormat.divider(): string                            // <hr class="blog-post-divider">
BlogPostFormat.toc(tocItems: {level, text, id}[]): string  // delegates to renderTOCHTML
```

---

## Module: src/utils/BlogUtils.ts

```ts
class BlogUtils {
  static calculateReadTime(content: string): string
  // Strips HTML tags, counts words, divides by 100 wpm → "N min read"
  // Returns '1 min read' for empty content

  static formatDate(dateString: string, options?: Intl.DateTimeFormatOptions): string
  // Formats via Intl.DateTimeFormat en-US, default: { year:'numeric', month:'long', day:'numeric' }
  // Example: "January 15, 2024"

  static extractTextFromHtml(html: string, maxLength?: number): string
  // Strips all HTML tags. If maxLength set, truncates with '...'

  static slugify(text: string): string
  // Lowercase, remove special chars, spaces/underscores → hyphens, trim hyphens
  // Example: "Hello World!" → "hello-world"

  static attachTocListener(tocId?: string): { observer: IntersectionObserver; destroy: () => void }
  // Wrapper for attachObserverToTOCLinks. Default tocId: 'toc'
}
```

---

## Module: src/utils/createToc.ts

```ts
function renderTOCHTML(
  headingsData: { id: string; text: string; level: number }[],
  opts?: { addNumbers?: boolean; linkClass?: string }
): string
```
Pure function. Returns HTML anchor links for each heading. No DOM interaction.
- Each link: `<a href="#id" class="toc-link" data-level="{n}" data-target-id="{id}" style="padding-left: {(level-1)*12+8}px;">`
- `addNumbers` (default: false) — prepend numbering
- `linkClass` (default: `'toc-link'`) — CSS class on `<a>` tags

```ts
function attachObserverToTOCLinks(
  tocId: string,
  options?: {
    activeClass?: string
    root?: Element | null
    rootMargin?: string
    threshold?: number | number[]
  }
): { observer: IntersectionObserver; destroy: () => void }
```
Browser-only (uses DOM). Finds TOC container by id. Observes linked heading elements. Adds `activeClass` (default: `'active'`) to the link of the heading currently in the viewport.
- Default `rootMargin`: `'10% 0px -35% 0px'`
- Returns `destroy()` to disconnect observer on cleanup
- Safe no-op if container not found

```ts
type TOCOptions = {
  contentSelector: string
  tocSelector: string
  headingSelector?: string
  excludeHeadingLevels?: number[]
  addNumbers?: boolean
  activeClass?: string
  linkClass?: string
  scrollBehavior?: ScrollIntoViewOptions
}
```

---

## CSS Classes (from style.css)

Classes generated by `BlogPostFormat` that you can style:

| Class | Usage |
|-------|-------|
| `.blogs-container` | Outermost post wrapper |
| `.blog-post-header` | Header section |
| `.blog-post-header-image` | Hero `<img>` |
| `.blog-post-title` | `<h1>` title |
| `.blog-post-description` | Description `<p>` |
| `.blog-post-tags` | Tags container |
| `.blog-post-tag` | Single tag `<span>` |
| `.blog-post-meta` | Header meta row |
| `.blog-post-date` | Date `<span>` |
| `.blog-post-readtime` | Read time `<span>` |
| `.blog-post-content` | Main content `<section>` |
| `.blog-post-tags-section` | Footer tags `<section>` |
| `.blog-post-author-section` | Author container |
| `.blog-post-author-avatar` | Initials avatar |
| `.blog-post-author-name` | Author name `<div>` |
| `.blog-post-author-organization` | Org name `<div>` |
| `.blog-post-divider` | `<hr>` separator |
| `.blog-post-with-toc` | Flex wrapper for post + TOC |
| `.blog-post-toc` | `<aside>` TOC panel |
| `.blog-post-toc-title` | TOC `<h3>` |
| `.blog-cards-container` | Cards grid |
| `.blog-card` | Individual post card |
| `.toc-link` | TOC anchor links |
| `.active` | Active TOC link (set by observer) |

---

## Usage Patterns

### Pattern 1: Blog listing page (SSR)

```ts
const blogs = new BlogsService('my-org');
const { posts } = await blogs.fetchPosts({ limit: 12 });
const html = BlogPostFormat.blogCards({ posts, urlPrefix: '/blog' });
```

### Pattern 2: Single post page with TOC (SSR)

```ts
const post = await blogs.fetchBlog(slug, { includeHtml: true });
const html = BlogPostFormat.blogPost({ post, toc: true });
// Client-side: attachObserverToTOCLinks('toc')
```

### Pattern 3: Docs sidebar tree

```ts
const { items } = await blogs.fetchDocs();
// items is DocItem[] with nested .children[] already sorted by .position
// Render as recursive sidebar nav
```

### Pattern 4: Static site generation (Next.js)

```ts
export async function generateStaticParams() {
  const { posts } = await blogs.fetchPosts({ limit: 50 });
  return posts.map(p => ({ slug: p.slug }));
}
```

### Pattern 5: Error handling

```ts
import BlogApiError from '@leafpad/blogs';
try {
  const post = await blogs.fetchBlog('slug');
} catch (err) {
  if (err instanceof BlogApiError) {
    if (err.code === 'TIMEOUT') { /* retry */ }
    if (err.status === 404) { /* not found */ }
  }
}
```
